div.div:
scanner.rs
nmcli rescan + list
(fallback: iw trigger/dump)
Parse output →
Vec
(bssid, ssid, signal, ch)

div.div:
debounce.rs
Ring buffer (last N scans)
is_stable(bssid):
count ≥ M in N samples
Filters: buses, phones,
hotspots (transient)

div.div:
resolver.rs
1. Check aps cache
2. Check not_found cache
3. Query WiGLE (on miss)
4. On 404 → not_found
5. On error → pending
6. Return positioned APs

div.div:
trilaterate.rs
1. filter_outliers()
median pos → reject
> max(200m, 3×median_dist)
2. weighted centroid
weight = 10^(dBm/20)
→ (lat, lon, accuracy_m)
